ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefix added before each tag, default "tag-"
ast.target: 在每个标签前添加的前缀，默认为 \"tag-\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace invalid CSS characters (e.g., "/" in sub-tags) with "-".
ast.target: 将无效的 CSS 字符（例如子标签中的 \"/\"）替换为 \"-\"。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The tags of each note are automatically added as CSS classes on the view container. Example: a tag "projet" becomes the class "tag-projet".
ast.target: 每个笔记的标签会自动作为 CSS 类添加到视图容器中。例如：标签 \"projet\" 变为类 \"tag-projet\"。

ast.name: text
